content: hmm i cant seem to like one shoy anything with my vortice can u tell me how u build her
or the main aspect of her dmg
i read the desc that she scale of on tentacle dmg, how do u speed it up, and what party should i use( im new )

Hi, so the way I have been playing her is a Pursuit spam carry for pushing the story. You can reference this guide, on what wheels and character recommendations
https://www.reddit.com/r/Morimens/comments/1s1xkmg/tldr_vortice_arc1_guide/

The main thing you want to level is her Reload. This deals a flat 700 x Lvl of the skill. The way this works is when you use another character's Exalt (the skills at the top left of the screen), she will do a massive amount of damage to the highest hp target. 

For the most part, you should be able to 1-2 shot Elite mobs and kill the boss in Arc 1. Realm Mastery scales your effectiveness of your tentacle's damage and shielding, but that usually isnt that important since you can kill the mobs so fast

She also has a special Posse that gives Aliemus (the meter for the skills to be used on the top left) to use the Exalt skills. But one of the key things on top of that is if Vortice is on your team, she actually casts a Pursuit when you use it! If you don't have it, you can go to the Story Mode -> 3rd Icon -> All the way to the right to do that story to unlock the Posse (Drowned Innocence)

So if you do the math, if you have Reload! in your hand & you are able to cast it 3x times and use the Posse, you deal 4 * Skill Level * (700) in just a single turn. (Ex: 4 * 4 * 700 = 11200 in just the first turn which is usually enough to do most of the boss's HP at least at my current stage)

This does not even include the Exalt Skill damage, Cards in hand, and even the Tentacle's damage as well!
